prompt: Vertical portrait 9:16 high-resolution atlas world map for a D&D 5e Forgotten Realms inspired heroic high fantasy RPG setting. Terrain type: dual_continent. Draw two large fictional continents in illustrated fantasy cartographic parchment style, separated by a dramatic non-vertical ocean passage: diagonal and S-shaped straits, crescent gulfs, storm narrows, shoals, broken coast shelves, and twisting channels rather than a simple straight split. One continent contains bright human kingdoms, frontier towns, ancient forests, elven realms, wizard towers, sacred temples, and dragon-haunted mountains; the other contains desert sultanates, volcanic badlands, dwarven holds, haunted swamps, lost ruins, monster kingdoms, frozen peaks, and wild jungle realms. Complex realistic coastlines on both continents: peninsulas, bays, gulfs, straits, broken shores, curved coasts, river deltas, fjords, capes, lagoons, barrier islands, sea caves. Islands are unevenly scattered between and around the continents with varied size and shape, including ruin islands, temple isles, pirate coves, and monster lair rocks. Large detailed high fantasy atlas, magical atmosphere, glowing rune stones and distant dragon silhouettes allowed, no readable labels, no legible text, no logos, no modern satellite style.
